2605.07837.title: Approximation-Free Differentiable Oblique Decision Trees
2605.07837.paper_summary: Decision Trees (DTs) are widely used in safety-critical domains such as medical diagnosis, valued for their interpretability and effectiveness on tabular data. However, training accurate oblique DTs is challenging due to complex optimization landscapes and overfitting risks, particularly in regression. Recent advances have introduced differentiable formulations that enable gradient-based training and joint optimization of decision boundaries and leaf regressors. Yet, existing approaches typically rely on approximations, either through probabilistic softening of boundaries (soft DTs) or quantized gradients such as the Straight-Through Estimator (STE). To overcome these limitations, we propose DTSemNet, a novel, semantically equivalent, and invertible representation of hard oblique DTs as neural networks. DTSemNet enables end-to-end training with standard gradient descent, eliminating the need for approximations in both classification and regression. While classification aligns naturally with this formulation, regression remains challenging due to the joint optimization of internal nodes and leaf regressors. To address this, we analyze the limitations of STE and introduce an annealed Top-k method that provides accurate gradient signals without approximation. Extensive experiments on classification and regression benchmarks show that DTSemNet-trained oblique DTs outperform state-of-the-art differentiable DTs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that DTSemNet can serve as programmatic DT policies in reinforcement learning environments, thereby broadening their applicability.
2605.07837.paper_summary_zh: 決策樹（DTs）廣泛應用於醫療診斷等安全關鍵領域，因其可解釋性和對表格數據的有效性而受到重視。<lb/>然而，由於複雜的優化地形和過擬合風險，訓練準確的斜決策樹是一項挑戰，特別是在回歸中。<lb/>最近的進展引入了可微分的公式，使得基於梯度的訓練和決策邊界及葉回歸器的聯合優化成為可能。<lb/>然而，現有的方法通常依賴於近似，無論是通過邊界的概率軟化（軟決策樹）還是量化梯度，例如直通估計器（STE）。<lb/>為了克服這些限制，我們提出了DTSemNet，一種新穎的、語義等價的、可逆的硬斜決策樹表示形式，作為神經網絡。<lb/>DTSemNet使得標準梯度下降的端到端訓練成為可能，消除了在分類和回歸中對近似的需求。<lb/>雖然分類與這一公式自然對應，但由於內部節點和葉回歸器的聯合優化，回歸仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們分析了STE的限制，並引入了一種退火Top-k方法，該方法提供準確的梯度信號而無需近似。<lb/>在分類和回歸基準上的大量實驗表明，經過DTSemNet訓練的斜決策樹超越了最先進的可微分決策樹。<lb/>此外，我們還展示了DTSemNet可以作為強化學習環境中的程序性決策樹策略，從而擴大其適用性。
2605.07837.author: Subrat Prasad Panda et.al.
2605.07837.authors: Subrat Prasad Panda, Blaise Genest, Arvind Easwaran
